question: Based on the quarterly platform engagement distribution shown, what can we conclude about the trend in the absolute number of User Registrations over the year?

options.A: The chart normalizes unrelated categories to 100% per quarter, so it only shows the share of User Registrations and not whether their absolute number is increasing or decreasing.
options.B: The absolute number of User Registrations increases each quarter because the green segment becomes largest in Q3.
options.C: The absolute number of User Registrations decreases each quarter because their percentage share falls after Q3.
options.D: The absolute number of User Registrations stays roughly constant across all quarters because the bar heights are equal.

explanation: The chart normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. It can suggest that the share of a metric is higher in later quarters, but it cannot establish an absolute increasing trend without the underlying totals. A higher percentage share does not necessarily mean a higher absolute quantity.
